message:
fix: Use imported join() instead of undefined path.join() in traceMode

Bug found during deep code review:
- Line 1911 used `path.join()` but only `join` was imported from 'path'
- This would cause ReferenceError when --trace flag is used
- Also fixed stale line number reference in comment about GIIL_HOME
